themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "וָאָֽרֶץ׃: and earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
